# 0008 — Ship a single unified dashboard view

**Decision.** Ship one combined view that mixes the project portfolio and the per-project
pipeline/decisions detail on the same screen.

**Why.** Looked like the fastest way to something clickable.

**Rejected alternatives.**
- Separate portfolio and project-detail pages — disqualified early as unnecessary surface area.

**True cost.** build: low / support: low.

**Status note.** Superseded by [[0009 refined-direction]] once the pipeline rail and the
portfolio grid turned out to fight for the same space.
